llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/auth.ts.summary: Citty subcommand `auth` that runs the GitHub device-code login flow and persists the resulting token to disk.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/check-usa.summary: Citty subcommand `check-usage` that authenticates and prints the account's Copilot quota snapshots (premium interactions, chat, completions).

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/debug.ts.summary: Citty subcommand `debug` that collects runtime diagnostics (package version, Node/Bun runtime, token presence, paths) and prints them as plain text or JSON.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/api-c.summary: Central source of base URLs and request headers for the Copilot and GitHub APIs, switching between public github.com and an enterprise tenant based on global state.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/api-c.languageNotes: All header builders are pure functions of `state`, so enterprise routing is decided at call time rather than at module load.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/appro.summary: Blocks a request on an interactive terminal confirmation, used when the server runs in manual-approve mode.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/enter.summary: Shared citty argument definitions and domain normalization for GitHub Enterprise tenants, stripping any scheme before storing the domain in global state.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/error.summary: Defines the HTTPError wrapper carrying an upstream Response and the forwardError helper that converts thrown errors into Hono JSON responses.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/model.summary: Local patch: declares which Copilot model id prefixes are served only by the OpenAI Responses API and exports the upstream error code used as the runtime fallback signal.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/model.languageNotes: A prefix allowlist plus an error-code fallback: the static list is a fast path, and anything it misses is still caught at runtime.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/paths.summary: Resolves the application's on-disk layout (config dir, token files) and ensures those directories and files exist before use.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/proxy.summary: Installs a global undici dispatcher that honours HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY/NO_PROXY per destination URL; a no-op under Bun, which handles proxying natively.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/proxy.languageNotes: Caches one ProxyAgent per proxy URL and falls back to a direct Agent, so NO_PROXY hosts skip the tunnel entirely.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/rate-.summary: Enforces the optional minimum interval between upstream requests, either sleeping until the window elapses or rejecting the call outright.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/shell.summary: Detects the parent shell (bash, zsh, fish, PowerShell, cmd) and emits a matching environment-variable export script so callers can source the server's settings.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/shell.languageNotes: Shell detection reads the parent process name on Windows and $SHELL elsewhere, so the generated syntax matches the caller's actual shell.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/state.summary: Single mutable module-level State object holding tokens, account type, model catalog, enterprise domain and rate-limit settings shared across the whole server.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/state.languageNotes: A module-scoped mutable singleton: importers observe live updates without an event bus or dependency injection.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/token.summary: Acquires and refreshes both credentials: the long-lived GitHub OAuth token (device flow, cached on disk) and the short-lived Copilot token refreshed on a timer.

Reimplements OpenAI's token accounting on top of gpt-tokenizer, counting messages, multimodal content parts, tool calls and JSON-Schema tool definitions to answer token-count requests without calling upstream.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/token.languageNotes: Per-model constants and a recursive JSON-Schema walker reproduce the provider's documented per-message and per-tool overheads.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/utils.summary: Small shared helpers: a promise-based sleep, a nullish guard, and cache warmers that populate the model catalog and VS Code version in global state.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/main.ts.summary: CLI entry point that assembles the citty command tree (auth, start, check-usage, debug) and runs it; this is the file the published bin points at.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/ch.summary: Handles OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions requests: applies rate limiting and manual approval, forwards to Copilot, and streams the reply back as SSE or returns it as JSON.
Hono router mounting the POST /chat/completions endpoint and wrapping the handler in the shared error forwarder.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/em.summary: Hono router exposing POST /embeddings, forwarding the payload straight to the Copilot embeddings service with no translation.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.summary: TypeScript type definitions for the Anthropic Messages API: request payloads, content blocks, tool use, and the streaming event union plus the translator's stream state.
Serves Anthropic's /v1/messages/count_tokens by translating the payload to OpenAI shape and counting locally with the bundled tokenizer instead of calling upstream.

Locally patched Anthropic /v1/messages handler that routes each request to either Copilot's /chat/completions or /responses backend, retrying on /responses when the model rejects chat completions, and translates both request and (streamed) response between the Anthropic and OpenAI wire formats.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.languageNotes: Dual-backend dispatch: a static prefix check picks the endpoint up front, and an `unsupported_api_for_model` error triggers a transparent retry on the other backend.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/auth.ts::.summary: Ensures the config directories exist, then drives the GitHub device-code login and optionally echoes the acquired token.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/debug.ts:.summary: Gathers the diagnostic snapshot: package version, runtime and platform, token file presence, and resolved application paths.
Entry point of the debug subcommand, selecting plain-text or JSON rendering of the collected diagnostics.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/api-c.summary: Builds the Copilot API base URL for the current account type and enterprise domain.
Assembles the authorization and editor-identification headers Copilot requires, adding the vision flag when the request carries images.
Builds the GitHub REST API headers carrying the stored OAuth token and editor identification.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/appro.summary: Prompts on the terminal and throws an HTTPError rejection if the operator declines the pending request.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/enter.summary: Strips the URL scheme and trailing slashes from a user-supplied enterprise domain.
Normalizes the enterprise domain argument and records it in global state so URL builders switch to the tenant endpoints.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/error.summary: Error subclass that carries the originating fetch Response so handlers can inspect the upstream status and body.
Logs a thrown error and turns it into a Hono JSON response, preserving the upstream status code and body when the error wraps an HTTP response.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/model.summary: Returns true when a model id matches a prefix known to be served only by the OpenAI Responses API.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/paths.summary: Returns the on-disk token file path, namespaced per enterprise domain so tenants do not share credentials.
Creates the application directory and token file if missing, with owner-only permissions.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/proxy.summary: Registers a global undici dispatcher that picks a cached ProxyAgent or a direct Agent per request URL according to the proxy environment variables.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/rate-.summary: Compares the elapsed time since the last request against the configured interval, then either waits or throws a rate-limit error.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/shell.summary: Identifies the invoking shell from the parent process on Windows or the SHELL environment variable elsewhere.
Renders environment-variable assignments (and an optional command) in the syntax of the detected shell.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/token.summary: Exchanges the GitHub token for a short-lived Copilot token and schedules a timer to refresh it before expiry.
Loads the cached GitHub token or, when absent or forced, runs the full device-code flow and writes the new token to disk.
Top-level entry point that splits a payload into input and output messages and returns token totals for both, including tool definitions.
Sums the token cost of every tool definition plus the fixed per-request tool overhead.
Maps a model id to the gpt-tokenizer encoding used to count its tokens.
Counts one chat message, covering plain text, multimodal content parts, tool calls and the per-message structural overhead.
Recursively walks a JSON-Schema property (nested objects, arrays, enums, descriptions) accumulating its token cost inside a tool definition.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/lib/utils.summary: Fetches the Copilot model catalog once and stores it in global state for later lookups.
Resolves the VS Code version string used in editor identification headers and caches it in global state.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/ch.summary: Rate-limits and optionally gates the request, forwards it to Copilot, then returns JSON or relays the SSE stream verbatim.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.summary: Translates the Anthropic count-tokens payload to OpenAI shape and returns the locally computed input token total.
Anthropic /v1/messages entry point: picks the Copilot backend for the requested model and transparently retries on /responses when /chat/completions rejects it.
Detects the upstream `unsupported_api_for_model` rejection by reading a clone of the error response, leaving the original body readable for error forwarding.
Runs the Anthropic request through the /chat/completions backend, translating the payload out and the JSON or SSE reply back into Anthropic events.
Runs the Anthropic request through the /responses backend, translating the payload out and the JSON or SSE reply back into Anthropic events.
